UpdateAppBlbSslListener.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, no longer than 64 characters
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.listenerPort: The port of the listener to update, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" / "LeastConnection" / "Hash", where "RoundRobin" is weighted round-robin, "LeastConnection" is least connections, and "Hash" is source IP hash
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.certIds: The certificate chain to be loaded by the listener; currently only one certificate ID is allowed. If multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.encryptionType: Encryption option. Supported values: tls_cipher_policy_default/tls_cipher_policy_1_1/tls_cipher_policy_1_2/tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure/userDefind. For corresponding encryption protocols and cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption)
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is set to userDefind, a list of protocol types composed of any combination of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption). Multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual (two-way) authentication; disabled by default
UpdateAppBlbSslListener.clientCertIds: When dualAuth is true, the client certificate chain to be loaded; currently only one certificate ID is allowed. If multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
